# Claude Project Surface

## Scope

This directory contains claude-native project adapters. Shared governance remains in `docs/00.agent-governance/`.

## Structure

- `agents/`: strict claude-native role adapters.
- `.claude/skills/`: generated shared skill projections.
- Provider settings and hooks: native lifecycle wiring to shared scripts.

## How to Work in This Area

Change canonical Stage 00 sources first, then run the registered provider renderer. Do not hand-author policy in generated adapters.
